name: Striders Corporation
summary: Striders Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate, hotel, overseas, and other businesses primarily in Japan. It develops and sells various logistic systems to support logistics operations. The company also offers turnaround consultancy; enterprise reconstruction and reorganization schemes; range of advisory services for mergers and acquisitions; and financial assistance services. In addition, it provides leasing services, such as market research and tenant recruitment, as well as sub-leasing services; collects rent; handles leasing renewal, cancellation, and evacuation contracts; and deals in facility trouble and tenant claims, as well as offers interior decoration and residential property management services. Further, the company offers building management services, including managing mansion units and front staff, cleaning work, and checking and maintaining building equipment, as well as rental and land agency, and rental guarantee services. Additionally, it manufactures and sells Chinese noodles; and owns, operates, and manages Narita Gateway and Kurashiki Royal Art hotels. The company also engages in the advertisement agency business in Indonesia; investment activities; and develops software application programs. Striders Corporation was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
